name: Mérida Arcane-1 Dropship
description: Standard planetary insertion vehicle. Brings crews and platoons to a planet, asteroid, or moon surface. Small fuel capacity, non-existent combat capabilities. The most common vehicle players arrive in.

name: Sawtooth APC
description: Armoured Personnel Carrier. Top speed 60 mph. Withstands toxic/corrosive atmospheres. Armed with rear-mounted smoke grenade launcher, flamethrower, HMG, and light mortar (1d10×10 DMG). Internal command centre with long-range comms and thermal sensors. Cost: 3mcr.

name: USCS Falstaff
description: Valecore Playtypus T9LC J1C-II Freighter. Jump-1 capable. Example ship from the Ship Manifest. Carries: Contraband Hold, Terraformer ×4, Colony Supplies, Illegal Medicine. Known issues: Coolant Leak, Waste Management System, Gravity Plating. Captain: Marshall.

name: Tannhäuser Hōshō Troopship
description: Built to carry hundreds of marines and deploy at a moment's notice. A flying base of operations. Sent to pacify entire colonies and planets. Includes: Boarding Airlocks, Operations/Command decks, Cryo, Cargo decks (45×20ft containers), Exterior Hangar (4 fighters + 4 dropships), Life Support, Reactor/utility decks.
